name: UNKNOWN
recommendations: Generous premium: the offered ~12.00% clears the ~4.00% risk-adjusted hurdle by ~8.00pp. The yield is well compensated for the priced tail-loss risk.
Total loss given event: a loss event is assumed to wipe out (nearly) the full principal, so the hurdle is driven entirely by the event probability.

name: UNKNOWN
recommendations: Negative premium: the offered ~12.00% falls far short of the ~104.00% hurdle. The yield does not compensate for the tail-loss risk; consider avoiding.
Negative risk-adjusted yield: after the expected annual loss of ~100.00pp the yield is ~-88.00% — expected loss exceeds the offered APR.
High loss probability: the implied annual chance of a loss event is elevated; small errors in the probability estimate move the hurdle materially. Demand extra premium or size down.
Total loss given event: a loss event is assumed to wipe out (nearly) the full principal, so the hurdle is driven entirely by the event probability.
